center.name: 欽加薩國家自然公園
center.summary: 欽加薩國家自然公園是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Paramo ground tyrant，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The paramo ground tyrant (Muscisaxicola alpinus), more widely known as the plain-capped ground-tyrant, is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Colombia, Ecuador, and possibly Peru.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The paramo ground tyrant (Muscisaxicola alpinus), more widely known as the plain-capped ground-tyrant, is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Colombia, Ecuador, and possibly Peru.Remsen, J
